en: When I saw you, you were playing in the garden with the children.

tr: Onlar üniversiteye başladıklarında, ben Ankara’da yaşıyordum.
en: When they started the university, I was living in Ankara.
When the bell rang, we were walking towards the classroom.
When we met, you weren't doing anything.
When you called me, I was washing my hands.
When you arrived at the station, the train was coming.

tr: Öğretmen bir soru sorduğunda, ben cevap veriyordum.
en: When the teacher asked a question, I was answering.
When I looked at her, she was smiling at me.
When I entered the room, they were playing chess.

tr: Ayşe beni aradığında, akşam yemeği yiyordum.
en: When Ayşe called me, I was eating dinner.
When we went to the beach, it was raining.
When I saw him yesterday, he was reading a book.

tr: Onlar partiye vardığında, biz dans ediyorduk.
en: When they arrived at the party, we were dancing.
When I woke up, the sun was shining.

tr: Evden çıktığımızda, onlar hala otobüs bekliyorlardı.
en: When we left the house, they were still waiting for the bus.
When I met him, he was working at a restaurant.

tr: Sen beni aradığında, sınav için çalışıyordum.
en: When you called me, I was studying for the exam.
When we arrived at the station, the train was moving.

tr: Ofise girdiğimde, iş arkadaşlarım toplantı hakkında konuşuyorlardı.
en: When I entered the office, my colleagues were talking about the meeting.

tr: Akşam yemeğine çıktığımızda, politikayla ilgili tartışıyorlardı.
en: When we went out for dinner, they were arguing about politics.
When I saw him in the park, he was running.
When I opened the door, they were cleaning the house.
When I looked out the window, it was snowing.

tr: Parkın yanından geçtiğimde, bazı insanlar basketbol oynuyorlardı.
en: When I passed near the park, some people were playing basketball.

tr: Yatmaya gittiğimde, kardeşim hâlâ projesi üzerinde çalışıyordu.
en: When I went to bed, my brother was still working on his project.
When I talked to her on the phone, she was crying.
When I arrived at the station, they were waiting for the bus.
When he opened the door, he saw me.
When it started to rain, the children were in the garden.
When the lights went out, Ali was afraid.
When they got married, they were happy.
When I heard the news, I was very sad.
When I finished my work, it was very late.
When they left the party, they were drunk.
When I entered the room, I saw the thief.
When Ali saw the message, he got very angry.
When we arrived at the airport, the plane wasn't there.

tr: Sen bana gerçeği söylediğinde, çok mutlu oldum.
en: When you told me the truth, I was very happy.
While I was sleeping, the phone rang.
While I was cooking, the guests arrived.

tr: Biz parkta yürüyorken, yağmur yağmaya başladı.
en: While we were walking in the park, the rain started.
While Ali was watching TV, the electricity went out.

tr: Onlar akşam yemeği yerlerken, biri zili çaldı.
en: While they were eating dinner, someone rang the bell.
While I was brushing my teeth, the phone rang.

tr: Öğretmen konuşuyorken, bir öğrenci sınıfa girdi.
en: While the teacher was talking, a student entered the classroom.
While I was reading a book, my friend called me.
While I was studying, the electricity went out.
While I was going to work, I saw an accident.

tr: Onlar dışarıda oynuyorken, kar yağmaya başladı.
en: While they were playing outside, it started to snow.
While Ali was taking a shower, his phone rang.
While Ayşe was talking, she suddenly started crying.
While the children were sleeping, the parents watched a movie.
While they were waiting for the bus, the rain started.
While Ayşe was shopping, she lost her wallet.
While I was repairing my bike, I cut my finger.

tr: Biz satranç oynuyorken, öğretmen içeri girdi.
en: While we were playing chess, the teacher came in.

tr: Ben gözlüklerimi arıyorken, kardeşim onları buldu.
en: While I was looking for my glasses, my brother found them.
While I was opening the window, the curtain fell.
While the children were jumping on the bed, the bed broke.
While I was singing, the music stopped.

tr: Onlar eve giderken, bir gökkuşağı gördüler.
en: While they were going home, they saw a rainbow.

tr: Ben ormanda koşarken, büyük bir tavşan gördüm.
en: While I was running in the forest, I saw a big rabbit.
While the rabbit in the forest was running, it saw me.

tr: Evdeki halıyı temizlerken, altında para buldum.
en: While I was cleaning the carpet at home, I found money under it.
While I was looking at the sky, I saw a UFO.
While I was looking for the woman in my heart, I saw Ayşe.

tr: Kitabımı okuyorken, evde bir ses duydum.
en: While I was reading my book, I heard a sound in the house.
While the thief was escaping, he fell on the ground.

tr: Çocuklar bahçede oynarken, küçük bir kedi gördüler.
en: While the children were playing in the garden, they saw a little cat.

tr: Annemin arkadaşları salonda otururken, ben mutfaktaki her şeyi yedim.
en: While my mother's friends were sitting in the living room, I ate everything in the kitchen.
While the birds were flying, it started to rain.

tr: Ben gözlerimi kapatırken, oğlum gözlerini açtı.
en: While I was closing my eyes, my son opened his eyes.
